volcano_sentence: It is second-most prominent mountain in the Philippines, it is a dormant volcano.
trail_sentence: Accept Reject PeakVisor Panorama 3D Hiking Map 3D Ski Map 3D Panorama 3D Import Photo Get PeakVisor App Sign In Search by GPS coordinates Teleport Latitude N S ° ' '' Longitude E W ° ' '' Units of Length m/km ft/mi Temperature ℃ ℉ Silhouettes Color [ Shift + C ] Hiking Map Hiking Map 3D Ski Map Ski Map 3D Panorama 3D Search by GPS coordinates Sign In Contact us GPS coordinates Settings Enter your name for confirmation: Yes Cancel ❤ Wishlist × Choose Delete Share × Copy Link Copy Coordinates Send to device Export to Garmin Export to Suunto Available for connected Garmin and Suunto accounts. 2 928 m Prominence Peak’s prominence is the least vertical to be covered to get from the summit to any other higher terrain.
peakvisor_about_text: Mount Pulag (Filipino: Bundok Pulag; Ilocano: Bantay Pulag) is Luzon's highest peak at 2,928 metres (9,606 ft) above sea level, third-highest mountain in the Philippines, and the 26th-highest peak of an island on Earth. It is second-most prominent mountain in the Philippines, it is a dormant volcano. Located on the triple border of the provinces of Benguet, Ifugao, and Nueva Vizcaya, the borders meet at the mountain's peak. Mount Pulag is third highest next to Mount Apo and Mount Dulang-dulang. Mount Pulag is famous for its "sea of clouds" and its exceptional view of the Milky Way Galaxy at dawn, which has attracted many tourists who wish to see the "other-worldly" scenery. The entire mountain is believed to be the home to the tinmongao spirits and is the sacred resting ground of the souls of the Ibaloi people and other ethnic peoples in the area. There's a hiking trail (T1) called Pulag Camp 3 - Pulag Summit leading to the summit. Mount Pulag is one of the 1 peaks along the Ambangeg Trail to Pulag.

peakvisor_about_text: Mount Sicapoo (2 361m/7 746ft a.s.l.) is a mountain in Philippines . The prominence is 1 585m/5 200ft. There's a demading hiking trail (T3) called Sicapoo Summit Trail leading to the summit. Mount Sicapoo is one of the 7 peaks along the Sicapoo Trail.
